nodes.title: Linear Algebra Fundamentals
nodes.learningObjective: Master the principles of vectors, matrices, and linear transformations essential for manipulating high-dimensional data spaces.

nodes.title: Calculus for Data Science
nodes.learningObjective: Understand limits, derivatives, and partial differentiation to model rates of change and navigate loss landscapes.

nodes.title: Basic Probability
nodes.learningObjective: Grasp the foundational laws of probability, discrete and continuous random variables, and core probability distributions.

nodes.title: Descriptive Statistics
nodes.learningObjective: Learn to summarize, visualize, and mathematically interpret the central tendencies and dispersions of complex data sets.

nodes.title: Discrete Mathematics
nodes.learningObjective: Develop a solid foundation in logic, set theory, and combinatorics to enable rigorous algorithmic thinking.

nodes.title: Matrix Factorization and PCA
nodes.learningObjective: Apply advanced linear algebra techniques, such as Singular Value Decomposition, to reduce dimensionality and extract latent features.

nodes.title: Optimization Theory
nodes.learningObjective: Formulate and computationally solve convex and non-convex optimization problems critical for training mathematical models.

nodes.title: Statistical Inference
nodes.learningObjective: Perform hypothesis testing, calculate p-values, and construct confidence intervals to draw robust, quantifiable conclusions from sample data.

nodes.title: Regression Analysis
nodes.learningObjective: Build, optimize, and critically evaluate linear and logistic regression models to quantify multivariate relationships.

nodes.title: Stochastic Processes
nodes.learningObjective: Model dynamic systems that evolve over time with inherent randomness utilizing Markov chains and Poisson processes.

nodes.title: Machine Learning Algorithms
nodes.learningObjective: Implement and mathematically deconstruct both supervised and unsupervised learning models, including SVMs and clustering algorithms.

nodes.title: Bayesian Statistics and Inference
nodes.learningObjective: Update probability estimates sequentially using Bayes' theorem and apply Markov Chain Monte Carlo methods for complex posteriors.

nodes.title: Deep Learning Mathematics
nodes.learningObjective: Master the rigorous backpropagation calculus, tensor operations, and structural mathematics underlying modern neural networks.

nodes.title: Time Series Analysis
nodes.learningObjective: Mathematically forecast future data points by extracting temporal dependencies, non-stationary trends, and seasonality.

nodes.title: Causal Inference
nodes.learningObjective: Distinguish causation from correlation using directed acyclic graphs, counterfactual frameworks, and quasi-experimental designs.
